title: 1Luiisssss
body:
![Blocks and items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e508309cf4d199da755c75ac07b85832d3bd1ca5.png)**Esta textura le cambia algunas cosas**
1. Cambio en observers,pistones,repiter,comparadores,hopper.
2. Cambio de items
3. Cambio del Gui
4. Cambio en el background
5. Cambio de skyoverlay (Dependencia de FabricSkyBoxes)

**This texture changes some things**
1. Change in observers, pistons, repiter, comparators, hopper.
2. Change of items
3. Change of the gui
4. Change in the background
5. Change of skyoverlay (Dependency on FabricSkyBoxes)
